title: lemma quadrifolia
intro: Lemma quadrifolia, also known as Four-leafed Milkwort or Four-leaved Milk Wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which aid in treating coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving congestion, and soothing sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Lemma quadrifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
